title: APPLE AirPods Max Wireless Bluetooth Noise-Cancelling Headphones - Midnight

crossSellProducts.title: APPLE USB Type-C to 3.5 mm Headphone Jack Adapter

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: You'll love how good your music sounds with Apple AirPods Max. The custom-built drivers produce deep, rich bass, punchy mids and crisp highs. With Active Noise Cancelling, block out background noises. Spatial Audio and Dynamic Head Tracking make movies sound epic.
goodToKnow: Beamforming mics isolate your voice on calls.
They create an acoustic seal around your ears.
Music automatically pauses when you remove headphones.
Hey Siri summons your voice assistant.
